protocol.title: National Biosafety Protocol
protocol.summary: Containment requirements, personal protective equipment standards, and waste treatment rules for biological research laboratories.

protocol.title: Chemical Safety Protocol
protocol.summary: Storage segregation, ventilation requirements, spill response, and exposure controls for chemical research operations.

protocol.title: Field Research Safety Protocol
protocol.summary: Remote-site risk assessment, communication requirements, medical evacuation planning, and environmental protection rules.

standard.title: Equipment Qualification Standard
standard.summary: Installation qualification, operational checks, calibration cadence, and maintenance records for critical lab instrumentation.

standard.title: Sample Handling Standard
standard.summary: Chain-of-custody, labeling, storage conditions, and contamination-prevention requirements for biological and physical samples.

standard.title: Data Integrity Standard
standard.summary: Audit trails, versioned analysis records, access logs, and tamper-evident storage requirements for laboratory information systems.

control.title: Access Control Policy
control.summary: Identity verification, role-based access, visitor protocols, and physical or digital access revocation for laboratory facilities.

control.title: Incident Response Program
control.summary: Classification, containment, reporting timelines, root-cause review, and corrective actions for laboratory incidents.

control.title: Emergency Readiness Program
control.summary: Drill cadence, emergency egress standards, backup power expectations, and continuity planning for critical research operations.
